{{ $current := . }}
{{ with .Site.GetPage "section" .Section }} {{ $sectionPages := (.Pages | append .) }} {{ range $sectionPages.ByWeight }} {{ $expand := (eq $current .) }} {{ $expand = (and (eq $current.CurrentSection .) (ne .FirstSection .)) }} {{ $id := substr (sha1 .Permalink) 0 8 }} {{ if not .Page.Params.tocHidden }}
{{ .Title }} {{ $isCRDs := eq .Params.product "crds" }} {{ if or $isCRDs (and .IsSection (ne .FirstSection .)) }} {{ end }}
{{ if $isCRDs }} {{/* Inject CRD kind anchor links as sub-items */}} {{ $crdFiles := $.Site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ $kinds := slice }} {{ range $_, $dir := $crdFiles }} {{ if $dir.definition }} {{ $kinds = $kinds | append $dir.definition.spec.names.kind }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ $pageURL := .Permalink }}
{{ range sort $kinds }} {{ . }} {{ end }}
{{ else if ne .FirstSection . }} {{ range .Pages }} {{ if not .Page.Params.tocHidden }}
{{.Title }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ if not ($.Param "docs") }} {{ partialCached "sidebar/user-docs" . }} {{ end }}
